---
execute:
  cache: false
format: 
  html: 
    toc: false
---

### Fun
- [*Links*](links/index.qmd)
- [front pages](projects/news.qmd)
- [pretty map](projects/map.qmd)
- [cricket](projects/cricket.qmd)


```{r generate links from iitd folder without depends}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| warning: false


iitd_files <- list.files("iitd", pattern = "\\.qmd$", full.names = TRUE)
iitd_titles <- sapply(iitd_files, function(file) {
  # Read the first 10 lines
  lines <- readLines(file, n = 20)
  
  # Find YAML front matter
  yaml_start <- grep("^---", lines)[1]
  yaml_end <- grep("^---", lines)[2]
  
  # If YAML front matter exists
  if (!is.na(yaml_start) && !is.na(yaml_end)) {
    yaml_lines <- lines[(yaml_start + 1):(yaml_end - 1)]
    
    # Extract title manually
    title_line <- grep("^title:", yaml_lines, value = TRUE)
    if (length(title_line) > 0) {
      # Remove 'title:' and any surrounding quotes
      title <- sub("^title:\\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\\s*$", "\\1", title_line)
      if (nchar(title) > 0) return(title)
    }
  }
  
  # Fallback to filename if no title found
  basename(file)
})

# Create links
iitd_links <- sapply(iitd_files, function(file) {
  paste0("[", iitd_titles[file], "](", file, ")")
})

cat("### IITD\n")
cat(paste("-", iitd_links, collapse = "\n"))
```


```{r generate links from iitd folder}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| warning: false
#| eval: false
 
library(fs)
library(yaml)

iitd_files <- dir_ls("iitd", glob = "*.qmd")
iitd_titles <- sapply(iitd_files, function(file) {
  content <- readLines(file, n = 10)
  yaml_data <- yaml.load(content[grep("^---", content)[1]:grep("^---", content)[2]])
  title <- if (!is.null(yaml_data$title)) yaml_data$title else basename(file)
  title
})

iitd_links <- sapply(iitd_files, function(file) {
  paste0("[", iitd_titles[file], "](", file, ")")
})

cat("### IITD\n")
cat(paste("-", iitd_links, collapse = "\n"))
```

```{r old}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false

### IITD
# - [Wi-Fi](iitd/wifi.qmd)\
# - [Convert Kerberos to entry number (and vice versa)](iitd/convert_entry.qmd)\
# - [Work in Progress Calendar (2024)](iitd/wip_2024.qmd)\
# - [An unofficial guide to RSTA](iitd/rsta.qmd)\
# - [Student orgs](iitd/student_orgs.qmd)\
```
